label: on_voice
text: She brought in her grandmother's handwriting from an old recipe card. We spent the consult figuring out where it should sit so it still felt private. Healed and settled now. 🖤 DM me to start your design.
why: Opens on the client's story; names consult + healing; soft CTA; one approved emoji.

label: on_voice
text: Fine line is unforgiving. One pass, steady hand, no hiding a wobble. That's the whole reason I draw every piece from scratch first. #finelinetattoo #blackworktattoo #brooklyntattoo
why: Craft over bravado; custom-only approved claim; specific hashtags.

label: on_voice
text: First tattoo? Good. We'll go slow. Free 20-minute consult, no pressure to book — just bring the idea, even if you can't draw it.
why: Speaks to the first-tattoo persona; approved free-consult claim; calm register.

label: on_voice
text: Botanical piece for someone who wanted her mom's garden on her forearm. We picked three plants that actually grew there. 🌿 Consults are free — link in bio.
why: Client story; approved consult claim; botanical emoji; soft CTA.

label: on_voice
text: Two weeks out and this one settled clean. Keep it out of the sun, keep it moisturized, and message me if anything looks off. Aftercare is part of the work.
why: Pillar 4 aftercare; included-aftercare approved claim; relationship beyond the chair.

label: off_voice
reason: generic AI tells + banned hype + rule-of-three
text: Ready to unleash your unique story? ✨ In today's world, your ink should elevate your look. It's not just a tattoo, it's a statement. Clean, bold, timeless. Dive in and book now! 🔥💯 #inkedlife #tattoooftheday
why: Contains banned phrases (unleash/elevate/dive in), contrast framing, rule-of-three, hype emoji, spam hashtags.

label: off_voice
text: The BEST tattoos in NYC, guaranteed painless and only $99 this week! Voted #1 studio. Walk in today — no appointment needed!
why: Superlatives, pain promise, price/discount, walk-in/flash framing — all off-brand and outside approved claims.

label: off_voice
text: At Ink & Iron, we leverage industry-leading expertise to deliver premium body art solutions tailored to your needs. Contact our team to learn more about our offerings.
why: Corporate sludge, faceless 'we', no client story, no real voice — the generic-SaaS failure this skill exists to prevent.
